FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY 33
Guru Buclhi Visheshita has Jupiter cannot like Moon because of
the wavering and of Moon. Jupiter likes Saturn because work is
guided by Jupiter. Jupiter must have power (authority) and hence
is friendly with Mars. As Sun is the King, eminent person and
Soul, Jupiter is friendly with Sun. For Jupiter, Moon and Dragon
Head are sometimes neutral.
VENUS
Some of the relationships"are explained above. Venus likes
work (Saturn), Mars (the power), and intellect planet of Mercury.
Venus also likes Dragon Head. Dragon Tail is sometimes
neutral.
SATURN
Except Sun/Moon/Mars and Dragon Head all other planets
are friendly with Saturn.
DRAGONHEAD
Except Sun, Moon and Mars, all other planets are friendly.
DRAGON TAIL
Mercury and Saturn are inimical.
Sun and Moon are sometimes neutral. All other planets are
friendly.
NEUTRAL ASPECTS
As mentioned above, some neutral aspects (relationships)
are there and they are delineated below : -
